name: Steak Au Poivre (Steak with Pepper and Mushro
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash and dry watercress. Remove the long stems.
2 Heat a medium-sized nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
3 Add watercress to the skillet and toss for one minute until just wilted. Remove to a serving dish and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4 Press seasoned pepper onto both sides of the steak.
5 Brown the steak for two minutes on each side. Transfer to a plate.
6 Lower the heat to medium. Add shallots, garlic, and mushrooms to the skillet. Sauté for five minutes.
7 Return the steak to the skillet and cook until desired doneness is reached (five minutes for a 3-inch thick tenderloin; adjust time accordingly for thinner flank steak).
8 Add brandy to the skillet and cook for 30 seconds.
9 Remove the steak from the skillet and place it on a bed of watercress.
10 In the same skillet, add cream and whisk. Season with salt to taste.
11 Spoon the sauce over the steak and serve with potatoes.
